explanation.sourceNotes:
RQ36 — Vocabulary in Context

Soal

In the title and paragraph 5, the word “footnote” most nearly means:

Pilihan

A. a qualification that acknowledges limits or additional context

B. a mathematical formula used to calculate gambling transactions

C. a hidden legal document attached to the minister’s report

D. a decorative mark placed at the bottom of an official announcement

Jawaban benar: A. a qualification that acknowledges limits or additional context

Tipe soal: Vocabulary in Context / Figurative Meaning

Lokasi bukti: Judul dan paragraf 5.

Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti

Paragraf 5 menjelaskan bahwa masalahnya bukan kementerian merayakan keberhasilan, tetapi absence of a footnote. Pernyataan kemenangan yang lebih hati-hati seharusnya mengakui bahwa transaksi turun dan enforcement domestik tampak berkontribusi, sambil menyatakan bahwa analisis tambahan diperlukan untuk memisahkan efek internal dari gangguan regional.

Inti pemahaman

“Footnote” di sini adalah metafora untuk caveat atau qualification. Maksudnya bukan catatan kaki literal, tetapi batasan klaim: pemerintah perlu mengakui bahwa penyebab penurunan belum bisa dijelaskan hanya dari headline.

Analisis opsi

A. Benar. Opsi ini menangkap makna metaforis footnote: catatan pembatas yang memberi konteks dan mengakui keterbatasan klaim.

B. Salah. Footnote tidak berarti rumus matematika. Walaupun passage membahas angka transaksi, masalahnya adalah interpretasi kausal, bukan perhitungan rumus.

C. Salah. Passage tidak membahas dokumen hukum tersembunyi. Footnote bukan bukti rahasia, melainkan pengakuan eksplisit terhadap batas klaim.

D. Salah. Ini membaca footnote terlalu literal sebagai tanda dekoratif. Dalam konteks passage, footnote adalah sikap analitis, bukan elemen tata letak.

Jebakan TOEFL

Metafora dalam judul sering dijelaskan di bagian akhir passage. Jangan terjebak membaca “footnote” sebagai catatan kaki literal; lihat fungsi istilah itu dalam argumen.

Catatan cepat

Metafora: footnote = caveat or qualification, bukan catatan kaki literal.

questions.keyEvidence: Kalimat sebelum frasa “Such a statement” menjelaskan bentuk victory statement yang lebih hati-hati: transaksi telah turun, domestic enforcement tampak berkontribusi, tetapi further analysis diperlukan untuk memisahkan internal effects dari regional disruptions.
questions.paraphrasedEvidence: Kalimat sebelum frasa “Such a statement” menjelaskan bentuk victory statement yang lebih hati-hati: transaksi telah turun, domestic enforcement tampak berkontribusi, tetapi further analysis diperlukan untuk memisahkan internal effects dari regional disruptions.
questions.questionText: The phrase “Such a statement” in paragraph 5 refers to a statement that would:

choices.A: claim progress while acknowledging that further analysis was needed to separate internal and external effects
choices.B: deny that suspicious gambling transactions had fallen compared with the previous year
choices.C: argue that domestic enforcement had absolutely no role in the decline
choices.D: blame ordinary citizens entirely for the existence of digital betting networks

explanation.summary: “Such a statement” merujuk pada pernyataan kemenangan yang qualified dan credible. Pernyataan itu tidak menolak keberhasilan, tetapi juga tidak mengklaim sebab tunggal secara berlebihan.
explanation.whyCorrect: Benar. Ini menangkap isi lengkap statement yang dirujuk: mengakui progress sekaligus menyebut perlunya analisis lanjutan.

optionAnalysis.A: Benar. Ini menangkap isi lengkap statement yang dirujuk: mengakui progress sekaligus menyebut perlunya analisis lanjutan.
optionAnalysis.B: Salah. Statement itu tidak menolak penurunan transaksi. Justru ia akan menyatakan bahwa transactions had fallen.
optionAnalysis.C: Salah. Statement itu tidak menolak peran domestic enforcement. Ia mengatakan enforcement appeared to have contributed.
optionAnalysis.D: Salah. Passage tidak menyalahkan ordinary citizens sebagai penyebab penuh digital betting networks. Public campaigns hanya memperingatkan warga tentang bahaya digital betting.

explanation.toeflTrap: Reference question tidak selalu merujuk pada satu noun. Kadang referennya adalah seluruh gagasan pada kalimat sebelumnya. Di sini “Such a statement” merujuk pada model pernyataan kemenangan yang hati-hati.
explanation.quickNote: Reference: frasa ini menunjuk seluruh model statement sebelumnya.

RQ37 — Reference

Soal

The phrase “Such a statement” in paragraph 5 refers to a statement that would:

Pilihan

A. claim progress while acknowledging that further analysis was needed to separate internal and external effects

B. deny that suspicious gambling transactions had fallen compared with the previous year

C. argue that domestic enforcement had absolutely no role in the decline

D. blame ordinary citizens entirely for the existence of digital betting networks

Jawaban benar: A. claim progress while acknowledging that further analysis was needed to separate internal and external effects

Tipe soal: Reference

Lokasi bukti: Paragraf 5.

Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti

Kalimat sebelum frasa “Such a statement” menjelaskan bentuk victory statement yang lebih hati-hati: transaksi telah turun, domestic enforcement tampak berkontribusi, tetapi further analysis diperlukan untuk memisahkan internal effects dari regional disruptions.

Inti pemahaman

“Such a statement” merujuk pada pernyataan kemenangan yang qualified dan credible. Pernyataan itu tidak menolak keberhasilan, tetapi juga tidak mengklaim sebab tunggal secara berlebihan.

Analisis opsi

A. Benar. Ini menangkap isi lengkap statement yang dirujuk: mengakui progress sekaligus menyebut perlunya analisis lanjutan.

B. Salah. Statement itu tidak menolak penurunan transaksi. Justru ia akan menyatakan bahwa transactions had fallen.

C. Salah. Statement itu tidak menolak peran domestic enforcement. Ia mengatakan enforcement appeared to have contributed.

D. Salah. Passage tidak menyalahkan ordinary citizens sebagai penyebab penuh digital betting networks. Public campaigns hanya memperingatkan warga tentang bahaya digital betting.

Jebakan TOEFL

Reference question tidak selalu merujuk pada satu noun. Kadang referennya adalah seluruh gagasan pada kalimat sebelumnya. Di sini “Such a statement” merujuk pada model pernyataan kemenangan yang hati-hati.

Catatan cepat

Reference: frasa ini menunjuk seluruh model statement sebelumnya.

questions.keyEvidence: Paragraf 4 menyebut beberapa kemungkinan penyebab penurunan transaksi: stricter domestic blocking, financial monitoring, public fear, reduced advertising, regional disruption, temporary migration of operators, dan changes in payment methods. Legalization of offshore betting platforms tidak disebut dan bertentangan dengan arah passage.
questions.paraphrasedEvidence: Paragraf 4 menyebut beberapa kemungkinan penyebab penurunan transaksi: stricter domestic blocking, financial monitoring, public fear, reduced advertising, regional disruption, temporary migration of operators, dan changes in payment methods. Legalization of offshore betting platforms tidak disebut dan bertentangan dengan arah passage.
questions.questionText: The passage mentions all of the following as possible causes of the decline in gambling transactions EXCEPT:

choices.A: stricter domestic blocking
choices.B: financial monitoring
choices.C: temporary migration of operators
choices.D: legalization of offshore betting platforms

explanation.summary: Soal EXCEPT meminta opsi yang tidak termasuk daftar kemungkinan penyebab. Tiga opsi pertama disebut atau diparafrasekan langsung dari paragraf 4. Opsi D tidak disebut sebagai penyebab penurunan.
explanation.whyCorrect: Benar sebagai jawaban EXCEPT. Passage tidak menyebut legalisasi offshore betting platforms. Pemerintah digambarkan memblokir, memonitor, dan melaporkan aktivitas terkait gambling, bukan melegalkannya.

optionAnalysis.A: Salah sebagai jawaban EXCEPT karena stricter domestic blocking disebut langsung sebagai salah satu faktor yang mungkin berkontribusi.
optionAnalysis.B: Salah sebagai jawaban EXCEPT karena financial monitoring juga disebut langsung dalam daftar faktor.
optionAnalysis.C: Salah sebagai jawaban EXCEPT karena temporary migration of operators disebut eksplisit sebagai salah satu kemungkinan.
optionAnalysis.D: Benar sebagai jawaban EXCEPT. Passage tidak menyebut legalisasi offshore betting platforms. Pemerintah digambarkan memblokir, memonitor, dan melaporkan aktivitas terkait gambling, bukan melegalkannya.

explanation.toeflTrap: EXCEPT question sering lebih sulit jika semua opsi berada dalam medan topik yang sama. Jangan hanya memilih opsi yang terdengar relevan; cek apakah benar-benar muncul dalam daftar teks.
explanation.quickNote: EXCEPT: tiga faktor masuk daftar; satu opsi bertentangan dengan arah passage.

RQ38 — Negative Fact / EXCEPT

Soal

The passage mentions all of the following as possible causes of the decline in gambling transactions EXCEPT:

Pilihan

A. stricter domestic blocking

B. financial monitoring

C. temporary migration of operators

D. legalization of offshore betting platforms

Jawaban benar: D. legalization of offshore betting platforms

Tipe soal: Negative Fact / EXCEPT

Lokasi bukti: Paragraf 4.

Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti

Paragraf 4 menyebut beberapa kemungkinan penyebab penurunan transaksi: stricter domestic blocking, financial monitoring, public fear, reduced advertising, regional disruption, temporary migration of operators, dan changes in payment methods. Legalization of offshore betting platforms tidak disebut dan bertentangan dengan arah passage.

Inti pemahaman

Soal EXCEPT meminta opsi yang tidak termasuk daftar kemungkinan penyebab. Tiga opsi pertama disebut atau diparafrasekan langsung dari paragraf 4. Opsi D tidak disebut sebagai penyebab penurunan.

Analisis opsi

A. Salah sebagai jawaban EXCEPT karena stricter domestic blocking disebut langsung sebagai salah satu faktor yang mungkin berkontribusi.

B. Salah sebagai jawaban EXCEPT karena financial monitoring juga disebut langsung dalam daftar faktor.

C. Salah sebagai jawaban EXCEPT karena temporary migration of operators disebut eksplisit sebagai salah satu kemungkinan.

D. Benar sebagai jawaban EXCEPT. Passage tidak menyebut legalisasi offshore betting platforms. Pemerintah digambarkan memblokir, memonitor, dan melaporkan aktivitas terkait gambling, bukan melegalkannya.

Jebakan TOEFL

EXCEPT question sering lebih sulit jika semua opsi berada dalam medan topik yang sama. Jangan hanya memilih opsi yang terdengar relevan; cek apakah benar-benar muncul dalam daftar teks.

Catatan cepat

EXCEPT: tiga faktor masuk daftar; satu opsi bertentangan dengan arah passage.

questions.keyEvidence: Setelah mengatakan bahwa announcement sounded impressive, penulis mengakui bahwa decrease of more than fifty percent is not a minor achievement dan bahwa government could reasonably claim domestic enforcement had played a role. Namun paragraf berikutnya memperkenalkan kritik tentang external factors, lalu passage menyimpulkan bahwa numbers can show that something happened, but they do not automatically explain why it happened.
questions.paraphrasedEvidence: Setelah mengatakan bahwa announcement sounded impressive, penulis mengakui bahwa decrease of more than fifty percent is not a minor achievement dan bahwa government could reasonably claim domestic enforcement had played a role. Namun paragraf berikutnya memperkenalkan kritik tentang external factors, lalu passage menyimpulkan bahwa numbers can show that something happened, but they do not automatically explain why it happened.
questions.questionText: Why does the author begin paragraph 2 with the statement “At first glance, the announcement sounded impressive”?

choices.A: To acknowledge the apparent strength of the government’s claim before questioning its causal certainty.
choices.B: To suggest that the numerical decline was impressive enough to end public debate.
choices.C: To shift attention from transaction data to the moral dangers of online gambling.
choices.D: To introduce the public campaign as the only effective part of the policy.

explanation.summary: Kalimat “At first glance” berfungsi sebagai transisi argumen. Penulis terlebih dahulu mengakui kesan awal yang kuat dari klaim pemerintah, lalu memperumit interpretasinya dengan mempertanyakan kepastian sebab. Jadi fungsi retorisnya bukan menolak data, tetapi menyiapkan pembaca untuk melihat bahwa data penurunan tidak otomatis membuktikan satu penyebab.
explanation.whyCorrect: Benar. Opsi ini menjelaskan fungsi kalimat secara tepat: mengakui kekuatan awal klaim pemerintah sebelum mempertanyakan causal certainty.

optionAnalysis.A: Benar. Opsi ini menjelaskan fungsi kalimat secara tepat: mengakui kekuatan awal klaim pemerintah sebelum mempertanyakan causal certainty.
optionAnalysis.B: Salah. Passage tidak mengatakan penurunan angka cukup untuk mengakhiri debat. Sebaliknya, seluruh passage menunjukkan bahwa data tersebut masih perlu dianalisis lebih lanjut.
optionAnalysis.C: Salah. Passage memang menyebut public campaigns warning citizens about dangers of digital betting, tetapi kalimat “At first glance” tidak berfungsi mengalihkan fokus ke bahaya moral judi. Fungsi utamanya adalah membangun kontras antara kesan awal dan analisis sebab.
optionAnalysis.D: Salah. Passage tidak menyebut public campaign sebagai satu-satunya bagian yang efektif. Campaign hanya salah satu dari beberapa tindakan yang mungkin berkontribusi.

explanation.toeflTrap: Rhetorical purpose sering menguji fungsi transisi. Frasa seperti at first glance menandai bahwa penulis akan mengakui kesan awal sebelum memberi pembacaan yang lebih hati-hati.
explanation.quickNote: Purpose: “At first glance” = pengakuan awal sebelum kritik terhadap klaim sebab tunggal.
explanation.sourceNotes:
RQ39 — Rhetorical Purpose

Soal

Why does the author begin paragraph 2 with the statement “At first glance, the announcement sounded impressive”?

Pilihan

A. To acknowledge the apparent strength of the government’s claim before questioning its causal certainty.

B. To suggest that the numerical decline was impressive enough to end public debate.

C. To shift attention from transaction data to the moral dangers of online gambling.

D. To introduce the public campaign as the only effective part of the policy.

Jawaban benar: A. To acknowledge the apparent strength of the government’s claim before questioning its causal certainty.

Tipe soal: Rhetorical Purpose

Lokasi bukti: Paragraf 2, dengan hubungan ke paragraf 3–6.

Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti

Setelah mengatakan bahwa announcement sounded impressive, penulis mengakui bahwa decrease of more than fifty percent is not a minor achievement dan bahwa government could reasonably claim domestic enforcement had played a role. Namun paragraf berikutnya memperkenalkan kritik tentang external factors, lalu passage menyimpulkan bahwa numbers can show that something happened, but they do not automatically explain why it happened.

Inti pemahaman

Kalimat “At first glance” berfungsi sebagai transisi argumen. Penulis terlebih dahulu mengakui kesan awal yang kuat dari klaim pemerintah, lalu memperumit interpretasinya dengan mempertanyakan kepastian sebab. Jadi fungsi retorisnya bukan menolak data, tetapi menyiapkan pembaca untuk melihat bahwa data penurunan tidak otomatis membuktikan satu penyebab.

Analisis opsi

A. Benar. Opsi ini menjelaskan fungsi kalimat secara tepat: mengakui kekuatan awal klaim pemerintah sebelum mempertanyakan causal certainty.

B. Salah. Passage tidak mengatakan penurunan angka cukup untuk mengakhiri debat. Sebaliknya, seluruh passage menunjukkan bahwa data tersebut masih perlu dianalisis lebih lanjut.

C. Salah. Passage memang menyebut public campaigns warning citizens about dangers of digital betting, tetapi kalimat “At first glance” tidak berfungsi mengalihkan fokus ke bahaya moral judi. Fungsi utamanya adalah membangun kontras antara kesan awal dan analisis sebab.

D. Salah. Passage tidak menyebut public campaign sebagai satu-satunya bagian yang efektif. Campaign hanya salah satu dari beberapa tindakan yang mungkin berkontribusi.

Jebakan TOEFL

Rhetorical purpose sering menguji fungsi transisi. Frasa seperti at first glance menandai bahwa penulis akan mengakui kesan awal sebelum memberi pembacaan yang lebih hati-hati.

Catatan cepat

Purpose: “At first glance” = pengakuan awal sebelum kritik terhadap klaim sebab tunggal.

questions.keyEvidence: Penulis mengakui bahwa penurunan lebih dari lima puluh persen bukan pencapaian kecil dan bahwa domestic enforcement appeared to have contributed. Namun penulis juga menekankan bahwa neither side could honestly prove a single, simple cause from a headline alone. Paragraf akhir menyebut bahwa victory without causal humility is not necessarily false; it is simply unfinished.
questions.paraphrasedEvidence: Penulis mengakui bahwa penurunan lebih dari lima puluh persen bukan pencapaian kecil dan bahwa domestic enforcement appeared to have contributed. Namun penulis juga menekankan bahwa neither side could honestly prove a single, simple cause from a headline alone. Paragraf akhir menyebut bahwa victory without causal humility is not necessarily false; it is simply unfinished.
questions.questionText: Which best describes the author’s attitude toward the ministry’s announcement?

choices.A: Cautiously critical because the announcement may overstate a single cause for the decline.
choices.B: Doubtful mainly because the author suggests the government’s figures may be unreliable.
choices.C: Fully approving because the author accepts the ministry’s explanation without qualification.
choices.D: Focused mainly on whether online betting should be legalized.

explanation.summary: Sikap penulis bersifat cautiously critical. Ia tidak menuduh data pemerintah palsu dan tidak menolak bahwa enforcement mungkin berperan. Kritiknya lebih halus: pengumuman kementerian terdengar seperti clean triumph, padahal penyebab penurunan mungkin lebih kompleks.
explanation.whyCorrect: Benar. Opsi ini paling tepat karena menangkap sikap penulis: hati-hati, analitis, dan kritis terhadap klaim sebab tunggal yang terlalu rapi.

optionAnalysis.A: Benar. Opsi ini paling tepat karena menangkap sikap penulis: hati-hati, analitis, dan kritis terhadap klaim sebab tunggal yang terlalu rapi.
optionAnalysis.B: Salah. Passage tidak menyatakan bahwa angka pemerintah tidak dapat dipercaya. Penulis menerima bahwa government had data showing fewer transactions and fewer users. Masalahnya bukan angka, tetapi interpretasi sebab.
optionAnalysis.C: Salah. Passage tidak menunjukkan bahwa penulis sepenuhnya menerima pengumuman kementerian. Penulis mengakui bahwa enforcement domestik mungkin berperan, tetapi tetap menekankan perlunya caveat karena penurunan transaksi belum tentu disebabkan oleh satu faktor saja. Jadi, “fully approving” dan “without qualification” bertentangan dengan sikap hati-hati penulis.
optionAnalysis.D: Salah. Passage tidak membahas apakah online betting harus dilegalkan. Arah argumentasi adalah evaluasi klaim keberhasilan kebijakan, bukan debat legalisasi.

explanation.toeflTrap: Author’s attitude question bisa memiliki dua opsi yang sama-sama terdengar dekat. Pilih opsi yang paling lengkap menangkap keseluruhan nada passage, bukan hanya satu bagian dari sikap penulis.
explanation.quickNote: Tone: menerima adanya kemajuan, tetapi skeptis terhadap klaim kemenangan yang terlalu bersih.
explanation.sourceNotes:
RQ40 — Author’s Attitude

Soal

Which best describes the author’s attitude toward the ministry’s announcement?

Pilihan

A. Cautiously critical because the announcement may overstate a single cause for the decline.

B. Doubtful mainly because the author suggests the government’s figures may be unreliable.

C. Fully approving because the author accepts the ministry’s explanation without qualification.

D. Focused mainly on whether online betting should be legalized.

Jawaban benar: A. Cautiously critical because the announcement may overstate a single cause for the decline.

Tipe soal: Author’s Attitude

Lokasi bukti: Paragraf 2–6.

Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti

Penulis mengakui bahwa penurunan lebih dari lima puluh persen bukan pencapaian kecil dan bahwa domestic enforcement appeared to have contributed. Namun penulis juga menekankan bahwa neither side could honestly prove a single, simple cause from a headline alone. Paragraf akhir menyebut bahwa victory without causal humility is not necessarily false; it is simply unfinished.

Inti pemahaman

Sikap penulis bersifat cautiously critical. Ia tidak menuduh data pemerintah palsu dan tidak menolak bahwa enforcement mungkin berperan. Kritiknya lebih halus: pengumuman kementerian terdengar seperti clean triumph, padahal penyebab penurunan mungkin lebih kompleks.

Analisis opsi

A. Benar. Opsi ini paling tepat karena menangkap sikap penulis: hati-hati, analitis, dan kritis terhadap klaim sebab tunggal yang terlalu rapi.

B. Salah. Passage tidak menyatakan bahwa angka pemerintah tidak dapat dipercaya. Penulis menerima bahwa government had data showing fewer transactions and fewer users. Masalahnya bukan angka, tetapi interpretasi sebab.

C. Salah. Passage tidak menunjukkan bahwa penulis sepenuhnya menerima pengumuman kementerian. Penulis mengakui bahwa enforcement domestik mungkin berperan, tetapi tetap menekankan perlunya caveat karena penurunan transaksi belum tentu disebabkan oleh satu faktor saja. Jadi, “fully approving” dan “without qualification” bertentangan dengan sikap hati-hati penulis.

D. Salah. Passage tidak membahas apakah online betting harus dilegalkan. Arah argumentasi adalah evaluasi klaim keberhasilan kebijakan, bukan debat legalisasi.

Jebakan TOEFL

Author’s attitude question bisa memiliki dua opsi yang sama-sama terdengar dekat. Pilih opsi yang paling lengkap menangkap keseluruhan nada passage, bukan hanya satu bagian dari sikap penulis.

Catatan cepat

Tone: menerima adanya kemajuan, tetapi skeptis terhadap klaim kemenangan yang terlalu bersih.

title: Banda Aceh: A City of Maritime Memory, Faith, Resistance, and Recovery
topic: History, Islamic identity, and urban memory
passage:
History, Islamic identity, and urban memory

Naskah

Banda Aceh, the capital of Aceh Province in northern Sumatra, is a city whose identity has been shaped by geography, faith, political authority, conflict, and recovery. Located near the northern entrance to the Strait of Malacca, the city grew in a region long connected to maritime movement across the Indian Ocean and Southeast Asia. Ships, traders, scholars, and political envoys passed through this part of the world, carrying not only goods but also ideas, languages, religious influences, and diplomatic relationships. Because of this position, Banda Aceh was never merely a settlement at the edge of Sumatra. It became a meeting point between local society and wider regional networks.

The city’s historical importance is closely tied to the Aceh Sultanate, one of the influential Islamic polities in Southeast Asian history. During its strongest periods, especially under Sultan Iskandar Muda in the early seventeenth century, Aceh became known for military strength, maritime trade, Islamic scholarship, and diplomatic contact with other regions. Banda Aceh served as a center where political authority and religious life developed side by side. Mosques, courts, scholars, traders, and local communities helped form a city whose influence reached beyond its immediate territory. In this sense, Banda Aceh’s history cannot be separated from the growth of Islam, governance, and regional power.

Trade also helped make Banda Aceh significant. Its location allowed the city to participate in networks that connected the Malay world, India, Arabia, and other parts of Asia. Pepper and other goods moved through Aceh’s ports, but the same maritime routes also supported religious and intellectual exchange. Trade did not only bring economic wealth; it helped create contact among people, institutions, and beliefs. A port city can become powerful not simply because goods enter and leave it, but because movement can reshape culture, scholarship, and political life. Banda Aceh’s identity grew from this combination of commerce, Islam, learning, and governance.

The city’s history also includes conflict and resistance. As European colonial expansion strengthened in the region, Aceh became known for its long struggle against Dutch control. The Aceh War was not only a military conflict; it became part of Aceh’s collective memory of resistance. During part of the colonial period, Banda Aceh was known as Kutaraja. The city’s later return to the name Banda Aceh reflected more than a change in wording. It suggested that a city’s name can carry memory, authority, and the desire to define a place according to its own historical identity rather than only through colonial administration.

In the modern period, Banda Aceh became widely known because of the Indian Ocean tsunami of December 26, 2004. The disaster caused immense destruction and deeply affected the city’s people, landscape, and memory. Many lives were lost, neighborhoods were damaged, and the physical shape of the city changed. Yet Banda Aceh’s story after the tsunami is not only a story of loss. Reconstruction, public memorials, museums, and tsunami landmarks helped preserve memory while also showing the city’s effort to rebuild. The disaster became part of Banda Aceh’s modern identity, but it did not erase the older layers of its history.

Today, Banda Aceh can be understood through several identities that overlap rather than replace one another. It is a former sultanate capital, an Islamic cultural center, a city of resistance, a provincial capital, and a place of recovery. A visitor may see modern roads and government buildings, but also mosques, memorial spaces, and signs of older historical memory. Banda Aceh’s history shows that a city is not defined only by buildings, dates, or administrative status. It is also defined by how its people remember, rebuild, and continue living with the past.

Soal dan Pembahasan

explanation.sourceNotes:
BAHRQ1 — Main Idea

Soal: What is the passage mainly about?

Pilihan:

A. The effect of the 2004 tsunami on Banda Aceh's recent reconstruction

B. The historical forces that have shaped Banda Aceh's civic identity

C. The decline of Banda Aceh's port activity under colonial rule

D. The development of Banda Aceh as a modern administrative city

Jawaban benar: B. The historical forces that have shaped Banda Aceh's civic identity

Tipe soal: Main Idea

Lokasi bukti: Seluruh passage, terutama paragraf 1-6.

Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti: Setiap paragraf menambahkan satu lapisan identitas: posisi maritim, Kesultanan Aceh, perdagangan, resistensi, tsunami, dan pemulihan.

Inti pemahaman: Gagasan utamanya adalah Banda Aceh sebagai kota berlapis, bukan kota yang dipahami dari satu peristiwa atau satu status administratif saja.

Analisis opsi:

A. Tsunami dan rekonstruksi memang penting, tetapi hanya satu lapisan dari passage, bukan gagasan utama seluruh teks.

B. Pilihan ini tepat karena mencakup arah umum passage: identitas Banda Aceh dibentuk oleh sejarah, geografi, agama, konflik, dan pemulihan.

C. Perdagangan dan kolonialisme disebut, tetapi passage tidak berfokus pada kemunduran port activity sebagai alur utama.

D. Status administratif modern muncul di bagian akhir, tetapi tidak cukup mewakili lapisan sejarah yang dibahas sejak awal.

Jebakan TOEFL: Main idea tidak harus memuat semua kata kunci passage; yang penting adalah cakupan gagasannya paling luas dan paling tepat.

Catatan cepat: Banda Aceh dipahami sebagai kota dengan identitas historis berlapis.

BAHRQ2 — Stated Detail

Soal: According to paragraph 1, why was Banda Aceh connected to wider regional networks?

Pilihan:

A. Its position connected it to major maritime routes.

B. Colonial officials made it the center of new regional routes.

C. Its inland farms attracted most traders and scholars.

D. It remained separated from ships, envoys, and outside ideas.

Jawaban benar: A. Its position connected it to major maritime routes.

Tipe soal: Stated Detail

Lokasi bukti: Paragraf 1.

Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti: Paragraf 1 menyebut posisi Banda Aceh near the northern entrance to the Strait of Malacca dan menjelaskan arus ships, traders, scholars, dan envoys.

Inti pemahaman: Koneksi regional Banda Aceh dijelaskan melalui lokasi strategisnya dalam jaringan maritim, bukan karena isolasi atau kebijakan kolonial.

Analisis opsi:

A. Jawaban ini sesuai dengan paragraf 1 yang menekankan letak Banda Aceh dekat pintu masuk utara Selat Malaka.

B. Kolonialisme muncul kemudian dalam passage, tetapi bukan penyebab koneksi regional pada paragraf 1.

C. Paragraf 1 tidak menekankan pertanian pedalaman; fokusnya adalah jalur maritim dan pergerakan manusia.

D. Pilihan ini berlawanan dengan teks karena Banda Aceh justru digambarkan terbuka terhadap kapal, pedagang, sarjana, dan utusan.

Jebakan TOEFL: Detail question sering mencampur tema yang benar dengan sebab yang salah.

Catatan cepat: Detail kunci: strategic maritime location.

BAHRQ3 — Vocabulary in Context

Soal: The word “polities” in paragraph 2 is closest in meaning to:

Pilihan:

A. religious schools used by local scholars

B. goods carried through regional ports

C. customs preserved in family memory

D. organized political communities or states

Jawaban benar: D. organized political communities or states

Tipe soal: Vocabulary in Context

Lokasi bukti: Paragraf 2: “one of the influential Islamic polities…”

Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti: Kata itu muncul dalam konteks Aceh Sultanate, political authority, military strength, diplomatic contact, dan governance.

Inti pemahaman: Polity mengacu pada satuan politik yang memiliki struktur kekuasaan, seperti kerajaan, negara, atau kesultanan.

Analisis opsi:

A. Sekolah agama mungkin berhubungan dengan Islamic scholarship, tetapi bukan makna "polities".

B. Goods berkaitan dengan perdagangan, sedangkan "polities" berada dalam konteks sultanate dan authority.

C. Customs terlalu umum dan tidak memuat unsur pemerintahan atau kekuasaan.

D. Makna ini paling tepat karena Aceh Sultanate dibahas sebagai entitas politik Islam yang berpengaruh.

Jebakan TOEFL: Untuk vocabulary in context, lihat medan kata di sekitarnya: sultanate, authority, diplomacy, governance.

Catatan cepat: Polities = political communities/states.

BAHRQ4 — Rhetorical Purpose

Soal: Why does the author mention Sultan Iskandar Muda in paragraph 2?

Pilihan:

A. To introduce the beginning of Dutch control in Aceh

B. To compare Aceh's religious life with its economic decline

C. To point to a period when Aceh's influence was especially strong

D. To show why Aceh avoided contact with outside regions

Jawaban benar: C. To point to a period when Aceh's influence was especially strong

Tipe soal: Rhetorical Purpose

Lokasi bukti: Paragraf 2.

Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti: Sultan Iskandar Muda disebut setelah frasa “During its strongest periods,” lalu diikuti military strength, maritime trade, Islamic scholarship, dan diplomatic contact.

Inti pemahaman: Nama tokoh itu berfungsi sebagai contoh masa puncak pengaruh Aceh, bukan sebagai biografi tokoh secara terpisah.

Analisis opsi:

A. Dutch control dibahas pada paragraf lain dan terjadi setelah masa awal abad ketujuh belas yang sedang dijelaskan.

B. Paragraf tidak membahas kemunduran ekonomi; ia menunjukkan political authority dan religious life berkembang berdampingan.

C. Nama Sultan Iskandar Muda dipakai sebagai penanda masa puncak pengaruh Aceh dalam militer, maritim, Islam, dan diplomasi.

D. Pilihan ini membalik isi teks karena Aceh justru digambarkan memiliki diplomatic contact dengan wilayah lain.

Jebakan TOEFL: Rhetorical purpose menanyakan fungsi detail dalam argumen paragraf.

Catatan cepat: Iskandar Muda = historical marker of Aceh’s strength.

BAHRQ5 — Inference

Soal: What can be inferred from paragraph 3 about trade in Banda Aceh?

Pilihan:

A. Pepper exports alone made Banda Aceh influential.

B. Commercial routes could also support religious and intellectual exchange.

C. Port activity weakened the city's political and religious institutions.

D. Goods moved through Aceh without affecting local society.

Jawaban benar: B. Commercial routes could also support religious and intellectual exchange.

Tipe soal: Inference

Lokasi bukti: Paragraf 3.

Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti: Paragraf 3 menyatakan goods moved through Aceh’s ports, tetapi jalur yang sama mendukung religious and intellectual exchange.

Inti pemahaman: Perdagangan dipahami sebagai jalur pertemuan ekonomi, gagasan, institusi, Islam, pembelajaran, dan pemerintahan.

Analisis opsi:

A. Pepper disebut, tetapi paragraf tidak menyatakan bahwa pepper alone menjelaskan pengaruh Banda Aceh.

B. Pilihan ini tepat karena paragraf 3 menghubungkan pergerakan barang dengan religious and intellectual exchange.

C. Teks justru menampilkan perdagangan sebagai bagian dari pembentukan budaya, pembelajaran, dan pemerintahan.

D. Pilihan ini meniadakan dampak sosial dan intelektual dari jalur maritim, padahal itu inti paragraf.

Jebakan TOEFL: Inference yang baik biasanya menggabungkan beberapa kalimat, bukan hanya mengambil satu detail.

Catatan cepat: Trade moved goods and ideas.

BAHRQ6 — Reference

Soal: The phrase “this position” in paragraph 1 refers to:

Pilihan:

A. Banda Aceh's later role as a provincial capital

B. the Aceh Sultanate's military strength

C. the city's recovery after the 2004 tsunami

D. Banda Aceh's location near the Strait of Malacca

Jawaban benar: D. Banda Aceh's location near the Strait of Malacca

Tipe soal: Reference

Lokasi bukti: Paragraf 1.

Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti: Sebelum frasa “Because of this position,” kalimat sebelumnya menyebut lokasi Banda Aceh near the northern entrance to the Strait of Malacca.

Inti pemahaman: Referennya adalah posisi geografis yang baru saja disebut, bukan status politik modern atau peristiwa pada paragraf lain.

Analisis opsi:

A. Status provincial capital disebut, tetapi bukan referen langsung dari frasa "this position".

B. Military strength dibahas di paragraf 2, terlalu jauh dari frasa yang ditanyakan.

C. Recovery setelah tsunami muncul pada paragraf 5, bukan konteks awal paragraf 1.

D. Referen terdekat dan paling cocok adalah lokasi Banda Aceh dekat pintu masuk utara Selat Malaka.

Jebakan TOEFL: Reference question harus dilacak ke frasa terdekat yang cocok, bukan ke ide besar seluruh passage.

Catatan cepat: This position = strategic Strait of Malacca location.

BAHRQ7 — Negative Fact / EXCEPT

Soal: According to the passage, Banda Aceh is described through all of the following identities EXCEPT:

Pilihan:

A. its recovery replacing earlier religious and political history

B. a former sultanate center linked to Islamic authority

C. a place associated with colonial conflict and resistance

D. a provincial capital where modern spaces coexist with older memory

Jawaban benar: A. its recovery replacing earlier religious and political history

Tipe soal: Negative Fact / EXCEPT

Lokasi bukti: Seluruh passage, terutama paragraf 4-6.

Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti: Passage menyebut former sultanate capital, Islamic cultural center, city of resistance, provincial capital, dan place of recovery; tsunami did not erase older layers.

Inti pemahaman: Yang tidak sesuai adalah gagasan bahwa recovery menghapus sejarah lama.

Analisis opsi:

A. Inilah jawaban EXCEPT karena passage menyatakan pemulihan modern tidak menghapus lapisan sejarah lama.

B. Paragraf 2 mendukung identitas Banda Aceh sebagai pusat kesultanan dan otoritas Islam.

C. Paragraf 4 menghubungkan Aceh dengan konflik kolonial dan collective memory of resistance.

D. Paragraf akhir menggambarkan ruang modern hidup bersama masjid, memorial, dan memori sejarah.

Jebakan TOEFL: Dalam EXCEPT, perhatikan kata yang mengubah hubungan ide; di sini “erased” membalik pesan passage.

Catatan cepat: EXCEPT: recovery did not erase old history.

BAHRQ8 — Inference

Soal: What can be inferred from the discussion of the name “Kutaraja” in paragraph 4?

Pilihan:

A. The name Kutaraja proves that Banda Aceh lacked an older identity.

B. The return to Banda Aceh had little meaning beyond wording.

C. City names can express memory, authority, and identity.

D. Colonial administration mattered more than resistance.

Jawaban benar: C. City names can express memory, authority, and identity.

Tipe soal: Inference

Lokasi bukti: Paragraf 4.

Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti: Perubahan nama dari Kutaraja kembali ke Banda Aceh dikaitkan dengan memory, authority, dan desire to define a place according to its own historical identity.

Inti pemahaman: Nama kota dipahami bukan sebagai label netral, melainkan sebagai simbol memori, kuasa, dan identitas.

Analisis opsi:

A. Pilihan ini berlawanan dengan passage karena Banda Aceh justru digambarkan memiliki identitas historis yang kuat.

B. Teks memberi perubahan nama makna sejarah dan politik, bukan sekadar pilihan kata.

C. Pilihan ini tepat karena paragraf 4 mengaitkan nama kota dengan memory, authority, dan self-definition.

D. Resistance tidak dikecilkan; paragraf yang sama menyebut Aceh War sebagai bagian dari collective memory.

Jebakan TOEFL: Detail sejarah sering dipakai untuk menguji makna simbolik, bukan sekadar fakta nama.

Catatan cepat: Names can carry memory and power.

choices.A: To narrow Banda Aceh's identity to its administrative role
choices.B: To rank tsunami memorials above older religious history
choices.C: To argue that modern development has replaced the city's past

title: The Honey Badger: Reputation, Adaptation, and Survival
topic: Animal behavior, biological traits, and conservation conflict
passage:
Animal behavior, biological traits, and conservation conflict

Naskah

The honey badger, also known as the ratel, has one of the most dramatic reputations in the animal world. Popular stories often describe it as fearless, aggressive, and almost impossible to defeat. Videos and anecdotes show honey badgers confronting snakes, raiding beehives, escaping predators, or standing their ground against animals much larger than themselves. These stories are not entirely imaginary, but they can easily become exaggerated. The honey badger is a remarkable animal, yet it is not invincible. Its reputation is best understood by looking at the biological traits and flexible behavior that help it survive in difficult environments.

One reason the honey badger seems so tough is its body structure. It has a strong build, powerful jaws, long claws, and thick, loose skin. The loose skin is especially important because it can make the animal difficult for a predator to hold securely. If grabbed, the honey badger may twist inside its skin and bite back. Its claws are useful for digging burrows, tearing open nests, and searching for food underground. These traits do not make the honey badger immune to injury, but they help explain why it can defend itself against many threats. Much of its “fearless” image comes from practical anatomy rather than reckless bravery.

The honey badger’s diet also contributes to its success. Although its name suggests a strong connection to honey, it does not live on honey alone. Honey badgers eat insects, small mammals, reptiles, birds, eggs, carrion, roots, fruit, honey, and bee larvae. This flexible diet allows them to survive in many habitats where food availability changes. When they raid beehives, the larvae and comb may be more nutritionally important than honey itself. Stories also describe honey badgers following honeyguide birds to beehives, although the frequency and reliability of this relationship are still discussed cautiously. The main point is that the honey badger is not a specialist dependent on one food source; it is an opportunistic feeder.

Another reason for the honey badger’s fame is its interaction with venomous snakes. Honey badgers can attack and eat some venomous snakes, and they may show a degree of resistance to certain venoms. However, resistance should not be confused with complete immunity. A venomous bite can still weaken, injure, or even kill an animal depending on the snake, the amount of venom, the location of the bite, and the condition of the honey badger. Popular descriptions sometimes turn resistance into a myth of total invulnerability, but the scientific point is more careful: the honey badger has adaptations that may improve survival in dangerous encounters, not magical protection against every venomous bite.

The honey badger’s behavior also helps it survive. It is curious, persistent, and capable of solving practical problems, especially when searching for food or escaping confinement. It may dig, climb, push objects, open weak barriers, or return repeatedly to a food source. These behaviors can make it difficult for farmers, beekeepers, and wildlife managers to control. Still, intelligence in animals should not be romanticized too quickly. Honey badgers are not planning like humans; they are using flexible behavior shaped by survival needs. Their reputation for cleverness comes from repeated practical success in dealing with obstacles.

Conservation discussions about honey badgers require balance. In some areas, the species may not be globally endangered, but local populations can still face pressure. Honey badgers may be killed by beekeepers when they damage hives, by farmers when they attack poultry, or by traps and poisons intended for other animals. In some regions, they may also be hunted for traditional uses. Practical conflict-reduction methods, such as protecting beehives, improving poultry enclosures, and reducing accidental poisoning, can help both people and wildlife. The honey badger’s story is therefore more than a collection of dramatic fun facts. It shows how an animal can be biologically extraordinary while still needing careful human management.

Soal dan Pembahasan

HBRQ8 — Inference

Soal: What can be inferred from paragraph 4 about honey badgers and venomous snakes?

Pilihan:

A. Honey badgers are usually safe from venom because their resistance is highly developed.

B. Venom resistance may help them, but bites can still be dangerous.

C. They avoid venomous snakes because they cannot eat them safely.

D. Loose skin is described as the main protection against venom.

Jawaban benar: B. Venom resistance may help them, but bites can still be dangerous.

Tipe soal: Inference

Lokasi bukti: Paragraf 4.

Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti: Teks menyebut may show a degree of resistance to certain venoms, tetapi resistance should not be confused with complete immunity.

Inti pemahaman: Honey badger dapat memiliki resistensi terbatas, tetapi tetap rentan terhadap cedera atau kematian tergantung kondisi.

Analisis opsi:

A. Pilihan ini terlalu jauh karena passage menolak complete immunity dan tetap menyebut risiko cedera atau kematian.

B. Jawaban ini menjaga nuansa paragraf: ada degree of resistance, tetapi venomous bite tetap dapat membahayakan.

C. Teks menyatakan honey badgers can attack and eat some venomous snakes, bukan selalu menghindar.

D. Loose skin dibahas sebagai pertahanan dari predator pada paragraf 2, bukan mekanisme venom resistance.

Jebakan TOEFL: Perhatikan pembatas seperti may, certain, and degree; resistance bukan immunity.

Catatan cepat: Venom resistance is limited.

title: Muhammad Ali: More Than a Champion
topic: Sports history, identity, conscience, and public courage
passage:
Sports history, identity, conscience, and public courage

Naskah

Muhammad Ali is remembered as one of the greatest boxers in history, but his importance cannot be measured only by the number of fights he won. Born Cassius Marcellus Clay Jr. in Louisville, Kentucky, in 1942, he grew up in a segregated American society where race shaped many parts of public life. His path into boxing began when he was still a boy, and his talent quickly became visible. By the time he won a gold medal in the light heavyweight division at the 1960 Rome Olympics, he had become more than a promising young athlete. He was already known for unusual speed, confidence, and a rare ability to attract public attention.

Ali’s rise to global fame came in 1964, when he defeated Sonny Liston and became heavyweight champion. Before the fight, many experts expected Liston to overpower him. Instead, the young challenger used movement, timing, speed, and confidence to change the public image of heavyweight boxing. He did not fight like the typical heavyweight of his era. He moved lightly, spoke boldly, and turned boxing into a performance of skill, personality, and psychological pressure. His style was physical, but it was also verbal. He used prediction, rhyme, humor, and provocation to unsettle opponents and make the public watch him even before the first punch was thrown.

The same year he defeated Liston, Ali publicly embraced Islam, through the religious movement with which he was then associated, and changed his name from Cassius Clay to Muhammad Ali. This decision was deeply significant. For Ali, the change was not a small matter of publicity; it was part of a larger claim about identity, dignity, faith, and the right to define himself. Many journalists, opponents, and public figures continued to call him by his former name, but Ali insisted on being recognized as Muhammad Ali. That insistence made his career more controversial, yet it also made him a powerful symbol for people who saw naming, race, religion, and self-respect as closely connected.

Ali’s most dramatic public conflict came during the Vietnam War. In 1967, he refused induction into the United States Army, citing his religious beliefs and opposition to the war. The decision brought serious consequences. He was convicted, stripped of his boxing title, and prevented from fighting during years that could have been the physical peak of his athletic career. This cost him money, fame, and professional momentum. However, it also changed how many people understood him. Ali was not simply a loud champion who enjoyed attention. He was willing to lose his title rather than act against his conscience. In 1971, the United States Supreme Court reversed his conviction, but the years away from boxing had already become part of his legacy.

When Ali returned to the ring, he created some of the most memorable fights in sports history. His rivalry with Joe Frazier produced contests that were physically brutal and emotionally intense. His 1974 victory over George Foreman in Zaire, often called the “Rumble in the Jungle,” became famous not only because Ali regained the heavyweight title, but also because he defeated a younger and stronger champion through strategy, endurance, and psychological control. By absorbing pressure and waiting for Foreman to tire, Ali showed that courage in boxing was not only the ability to attack. Sometimes it was the ability to remain calm under danger and turn an opponent’s strength against him.

Ali’s later years made his public image even more complex. Parkinson’s disease affected his speech and movement, changing the way the world saw a man once famous for speed and verbal brilliance. Yet his weakened body did not erase his influence. In many ways, it deepened it. Ali became a global symbol of resilience, humanitarian service, religious conviction, and personal courage. His life shows why athletes can matter beyond statistics. A record can tell how many fights a boxer won, but it cannot fully explain why people remember him. Muhammad Ali remains unforgettable because he combined athletic greatness with identity, conscience, showmanship, and the courage to be publicly himself.

Soal dan Pembahasan

Catatan cepat: This = refusal and its consequences.

title: Pro Evolution Soccer: A Game That Refused to Disappear
topic: Football games, player memory, and community preservation
passage:
Football games, player memory, and community preservation

Naskah

Pro Evolution Soccer, often shortened to PES, was more than a football game series for many players. Its roots were connected to Konami’s Winning Eleven titles, and it became especially popular during the PlayStation 2 era, when football games were central to social gaming in many homes, rental game shops, dorm rooms, and small tournaments. PES did not always have the strongest official licenses. Its main competitor was often praised for real club names, official kits, broadcast-style presentation, and wider licensing. Yet PES built its identity around something different: the feeling of football once the match began. For many fans, the ball seemed to have weight, passing required timing, pressure could create mistakes, and a goal felt earned rather than simply triggered by animation.

This gameplay feel explains why PES remained meaningful even when it lacked some official details. A team might appear with an altered name, and a kit might not be fully licensed, but the rhythm of the match could still feel convincing. Players often remember PES for the way midfield battles developed, how through passes opened space, how long shots surprised goalkeepers, and how a small tactical change could alter the flow of a match. Master League also became a major part of the series’ identity. It allowed players to build a team over seasons, develop unknown players, buy and sell carefully, and gradually turn a weak squad into something personal. For many players, Master League was not only a mode; it was a private football story.

Debates about the best PES version remain common among fans because different entries are remembered for different reasons. PES 6 is often praised for its speed, simplicity, and lasting multiplayer appeal. PES 2013 is frequently remembered for its attacking variety, individual player feel, and strong community attachment. PES 2021, although officially released as a Season Update rather than a completely new game, became important to many longtime players because it preserved one of the last strong foundations for the traditional PES experience before the full shift toward eFootball. These debates show that “the best PES” is not a single objective fact. Some players value nostalgia and local multiplayer; others value realism, mod support, career mode, or gameplay balance.

The transition from PES to eFootball changed the meaning of the series for many players. Konami presented eFootball as an evolution of the football game brand, with a new engine, free-to-play access, online focus, and availability across multiple devices. From a business perspective, this direction reflected a gaming industry increasingly shaped by live-service models, cross-platform play, and continuing updates. However, many longtime PES fans felt that something had been lost. They missed the feeling of buying a complete football game, playing offline modes for years, modifying teams, and returning to Master League as a familiar home. The issue was not simply that the name changed. For many fans, the rhythm and structure of the experience changed with it.

This is why community projects and modding became so important. Because PES 2021 remained a strong foundation, modders continued updating teams, kits, leagues, faces, stadiums, tactics, and gameplay details. Projects such as SP Football Life became meaningful because they preserved much of the spirit of traditional PES career play while extending the life of a game whose official direction had changed. Football Life is not an official Konami sequel, but for many players it became a practical continuation of the PES experience: a way to keep playing a familiar style of football game with updated content and a stronger offline identity.

The story of PES is therefore not only a story about nostalgia. It is also a story about how players define value in a sports game. PES had weaknesses: licensing problems, uneven menus, inconsistent commentary, and online limitations. Yet many fans forgave those weaknesses because the game often captured something difficult to measure: the rhythm, tension, imperfection, and surprise of football. For them, PES is not just an old name replaced by eFootball. It is a style of play, a set of memories, and a community tradition that still feels alive whenever the ball rolls naturally, a pass finds space, and a small team in Master League begins to feel like home.

Soal dan Pembahasan

PESRQ7 — Negative Fact / EXCEPT

Soal: According to the passage, PES is associated with all of the following EXCEPT:

Pilihan:

A. gameplay feel that remained meaningful despite incomplete licensing

B. licensing that made it consistently more presentation-focused than its competitor

C. Master League as a mode for building a personal football story

D. community updates that preserved traditional PES play

Jawaban benar: B. licensing that made it consistently more presentation-focused than its competitor

Tipe soal: Negative Fact / EXCEPT

Lokasi bukti: Seluruh passage, terutama paragraf 1, 2, dan 5.

Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti: Passage menyatakan PES lacked some official details, tetapi kuat dalam feel, Master League, dan modding community.

Inti pemahaman: Yang tidak sesuai adalah klaim bahwa PES secara konsisten lebih kuat dalam official licensing daripada kompetitornya.

Analisis opsi:

A. Paragraf 1-2 mendukung bahwa feel tetap bermakna meski lisensi tidak lengkap.

B. Inilah EXCEPT karena passage menyatakan competitor sering lebih kuat dalam license and presentation.

C. Master League jelas disebut sebagai bagian besar identitas PES.

D. Paragraf 5 mendukung peran komunitas dan modding dalam mempertahankan traditional PES play.

Jebakan TOEFL: EXCEPT yang kuat bisa memakai tema benar tetapi membalik pihak yang memiliki keunggulan.

Catatan cepat: PES was not defined by strongest licensing.

title: The Quiet Wonders of the Human Body
topic: Biological systems, balance, protection, and responsible care
passage:
Biological systems, balance, protection, and responsible care

Naskah

The human body is often compared to a machine, but this comparison is useful only up to a point. A machine usually follows a fixed design and performs a limited set of tasks. The body, by contrast, is a living system that grows, repairs, adapts, remembers, protects itself, and responds to changing conditions. Even ordinary actions, such as walking across a room or reading a sentence, depend on many coordinated processes that most people never notice.

One of the body's most important abilities is maintaining internal balance. This process, often called homeostasis, allows the body to keep essential conditions such as temperature, blood sugar, blood pressure, oxygen level, and fluid balance within workable ranges. Homeostasis is not stillness. It is a dynamic process in which the body detects change, sends signals, adjusts activity, and reduces or increases responses as needed. Sweating, shivering, changes in blood vessel size, hunger, thirst, and hormonal regulation all show that stability is achieved through active adjustment.

The heart shows this quiet coordination clearly. It beats continuously, sending blood through a network of vessels that reaches nearly every part of the body. Blood carries oxygen and nutrients to tissues while also helping remove waste products. The heart does not wait for conscious instruction before it works, but its rhythm can change when the body exercises, rests, experiences fear, or faces illness. Its constant activity is therefore not mechanical repetition alone; it is responsive support for the needs of living tissue.

The brain is another example of complexity hidden within daily life. It receives signals from the senses, interprets information, stores memories, guides movement, and helps regulate emotion and attention. A person can turn toward a sudden sound, recognize a familiar face, or understand a sentence because many neural processes are working together. The brain does not act alone, however. It depends on blood supply, oxygen, hormones, immune protection, and the condition of the rest of the body. Mental life is therefore deeply connected to bodily life.

The body also protects itself in remarkable ways. The skin acts as a living barrier, but protection does not stop at the surface. The immune system identifies germs, damaged cells, and unfamiliar substances, then responds through many types of cells and signals. Inflammation can be uncomfortable, but it can also help bring repair cells and immune activity to an injured area. White blood cells, antibodies, and memory cells show that protection is not a single wall; it is a layered system of recognition, response, and learning.

Healing reveals how deeply connected the body's systems are. A wound does not close simply because skin moves across an opening. Blood clotting, immune defense, new tissue formation, oxygen delivery, nutrition, and time all contribute to repair. The process can be slowed by infection, poor circulation, stress, or inadequate nutrition. This is why a small wound can sometimes teach a large lesson: the body is powerful, but its power depends on support from many conditions.

For this reason, understanding the human body should lead not only to amazement, but also to responsibility. Sleep, nutrition, movement, clean water, emotional balance, and medical care are not luxuries separate from biology; they are ways of supporting the systems that support life. The body is strong, but it is not limitless. Pain, fatigue, fever, and weakness are not merely interruptions; they can be signs that balance is being challenged. To notice the body's quiet work is to see that every breath, heartbeat, and healed wound is part of a complex and living achievement.

Soal dan Pembahasan

HBWQ1 — Main Idea

Soal: What is the passage mainly about?

Pilihan:

A. The human body as a fixed machine with predictable tasks

B. How body systems work together to maintain life and respond to change

C. The brain as the single system responsible for most body functions

D. Why ordinary body processes are simple and need little attention

Jawaban benar: B. How body systems work together to maintain life and respond to change

Tipe soal: Main Idea

Lokasi bukti: Seluruh passage, terutama paragraf 1-7.

Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti: Passage membahas tubuh sebagai living system, homeostasis, jantung, otak, immune protection, healing, dan responsibility.

Inti pemahaman: Gagasan utama adalah tubuh sebagai sistem hidup yang terkoordinasi dan perlu dirawat, bukan sekadar mesin.

Analisis opsi:

A. Paragraf 1 memakai machine comparison hanya untuk menunjukkan batasnya.

B. Pilihan ini tepat karena mencakup homeostasis, heart, brain, immune protection, healing, and responsible care.

C. Brain penting, tetapi passage juga membahas banyak sistem lain.

D. Passage justru menunjukkan proses biasa sangat kompleks dan terkoordinasi.

title: Longing: The Quiet Shape of Absence
topic: Emotion, memory, patience, and human connection
passage:
Emotion, memory, patience, and human connection

Naskah

Longing is often treated as a private feeling, but it can also be understood as a complex emotional response to absence. In Indonesian, the word rindu may suggest a tender ache, a quiet pull toward someone or something absent, and a form of desire shaped by attachment. Longing is therefore not the same as a simple wish for possession. It often appears when memory, distance, affection, and meaning meet inside one experience.

Unlike ordinary desire, longing often carries memory within it. A person does not simply want something; he remembers how the world felt when that person, place, or season was near. A smell, a road, a voice, a gesture, a season, or a promise can return as a trace of what has been lost or postponed. This trace does not replace presence, but it can keep emotional connection alive even when the object of longing is absent.

Longing also reveals a quiet form of strength. People often imagine strength as the ability to forget, move on quickly, or leave the past untouched. Yet there is another kind of strength in remembering without being destroyed by memory. A person who longs may still study, work, laugh, pray, and care for others. The longing does not disappear; it learns where to sit. It becomes quieter, more disciplined, and less demanding, but it still reminds the person that some bonds continue to matter.

Not all longing looks backward. Some forms of longing reach toward the future. A student far from home may long for the day he returns with good news. A traveler may long for a place he has never visited but has imagined for years. A person waiting for healing may long for a morning when pain is lighter. In these cases, longing is not merely attachment to what has been lost; it becomes a way of giving shape to hope.

For this reason, longing should not automatically be treated as weakness. It can become harmful if it traps a person so deeply in the past that the present is neglected. However, when held with wisdom, longing can deepen gratitude, sharpen memory, and remind people that human beings are shaped by connection. To long for someone or something is to admit that certain presences have mattered. The feeling may be painful, but pain does not make it meaningless.

Soal dan Pembahasan

Jebakan TOEFL: EXCEPT pada teks reflektif sering membalik nilai emosional utama.

Catatan cepat: Longing exists because something mattered.

title: Indonesia’s Wasted Heat: The Energy Hiding in Plain Sight
topic: Energy efficiency, waste heat recovery, and national opportunity
passage:
Energy efficiency, waste heat recovery, and national opportunity

Naskah

Indonesia often discusses energy as if the country’s main task is always to add new supply: more power plants, more fuel, more panels, more batteries, and more transmission lines. New supply is important for a growing economy, but one of the country’s overlooked energy opportunities is not a new source at all. It is heat that already exists but is poorly managed, poorly captured, or simply released into the environment. Thinking about heat differently can turn a familiar problem into part of a wiser energy future.

Not all useful heat is waste heat. Some heat, such as geothermal heat, is a natural resource that remains underused; other heat, such as industrial exhaust or hot wastewater, is a by-product of human activity that is often discarded. Indonesia’s geothermal resources are especially important because the country lies along an active volcanic belt, giving it major underground heat potential that does not depend on daylight or daily weather. Even so, only part of that potential has been developed into installed capacity. This gap is not caused by a lack of heat itself, but by exploration risk, investment cost, permits, infrastructure, and the difficulty of bringing projects from resource mapping to reliable use.

Industrial heat presents another missed opportunity. Cement plants, steel facilities, refineries, smelters, food-processing plants, and power stations use heat to transform raw materials into useful products. In many of these processes, heat leaves the system through exhaust gases, cooling water, hot surfaces, or steam that is no longer used efficiently. Some of this heat may be too low in temperature or too scattered to recover economically, but some can support drying, preheating, water heating, or electricity generation through waste heat recovery systems. The key question is not whether heat exists, but whether its temperature, location, timing, and cost make recovery sensible.

Buildings and cities also waste heat in less visible ways. Air conditioners remove heat from indoor spaces and release it outdoors, rooftops absorb sunlight and radiate warmth, and hotels, hospitals, kitchens, laundries, and data centers produce steady streams of warm air or water. In hot cities, this discarded heat can add to cooling demand, making people use even more electricity to remove heat that has already been poorly managed. Better insulation, reflective surfaces, district cooling, shade, ventilation, and heat recovery from large buildings can reduce this cycle when they are planned carefully.

Waste heat is difficult to use because heat does not always appear where and when it is needed. Electricity can often be transmitted over long distances more easily than low-grade heat. A factory may release heat at night, while a nearby building may need hot water at another time. A geothermal area may be far from industrial users. Capturing heat may require pipes, heat exchangers, storage, careful maintenance, and long-term coordination among companies, utilities, and local governments. For that reason, not every heat source is worth capturing; the value depends on matching the source with the right use.

The larger barrier, however, may not be technology alone. It is also the way energy is imagined. New power plants are easy to picture, while saved energy is harder to see. A megawatt generated can look more impressive than a megawatt avoided through efficiency. Yet energy that is not wasted can be as valuable as energy that is newly produced. If planners, industries, and cities treat heat as a resource to be mapped and managed, they may find opportunities that are currently hidden in ordinary operations.

Indonesia’s wasted heat should therefore be understood as a national opportunity hiding in plain sight. Geothermal fields, industrial facilities, commercial buildings, and urban systems all show that heat is not only something to endure or discard. It can be mapped, managed, recovered, and reused when the scale, temperature, distance, cost, and users fit. Indonesia’s future energy system will not be built only by producing more. It will also depend on wasting less of what is already available.

Soal dan Pembahasan

Soal: What is the passage mainly about?

Pilihan:

A. Why Indonesia should prioritize new power plants over efficiency

B. Why geothermal energy and waste heat are simple to develop once found

C. Why urban heat is only a comfort issue with little energy relevance

D. The potential and challenges of using wasted heat more effectively in Indonesia

Jawaban benar: D. The potential and challenges of using wasted heat more effectively in Indonesia

Tipe soal: Main Idea

Lokasi bukti: Seluruh passage, terutama paragraf 1-7.

Catatan cepat: Wasted heat = hidden national opportunity.

D. Paragraf 5 mendukung planning, storage, and matching source with use.

Catatan cepat: Not all heat is worth capturing.

title: Zamzam Water: Faith, Science, and Modern Management
topic: Religious tradition, water quality, and public service
passage:
Religious tradition, water quality, and public service

Naskah

Zamzam water is one of the most recognized sacred waters in the Islamic world. It comes from the Zamzam Well, located within the Masjid al-Haram complex in Makkah, near the Kaaba. For Muslims, Zamzam is not merely drinking water. It is connected to the story of Hajar and her son Ismail, who, according to Islamic tradition, were in the valley of Makkah when water was desperately needed. Hajar’s search for water between Safa and Marwa is remembered in the ritual of Sa’i during Hajj and Umrah. Because of this connection, drinking Zamzam can be both a physical act and a religious experience for many pilgrims.

The significance of Zamzam also comes from continuity. For centuries, pilgrims have associated the well with mercy, nourishment, prayer, and the sacred history of Makkah. Yet the modern supply of Zamzam should not be imagined as a simple bucket drawn from an ancient well without supervision. Today, its extraction, treatment, storage, and distribution are managed through organized systems. Specialized institutions monitor the well, study its sources, protect the groundwater that feeds it, and help ensure that pilgrims can access Zamzam safely. This management is necessary because Zamzam is not only a historical and religious symbol; it is also a water resource used by millions of visitors.

Scientifically, Zamzam can be discussed as groundwater with a distinctive mineral profile. Studies have described it as alkaline and rich in dissolved minerals such as calcium and magnesium. This mineral content helps explain why Zamzam may taste different from ordinary bottled water. Some analyses have compared its chemical and microbial quality with drinking-water standards and found many measured elements within acceptable limits, although total dissolved solids may be higher than in some common drinking waters. Such findings allow Zamzam to be studied through chemistry, microbiology, and hydrogeology. However, scientific description alone cannot fully explain what Zamzam means to believers.

For this reason, claims about Zamzam should be handled carefully. Many Muslims drink it with prayer, gratitude, and hope, believing in its blessing. A respectful scientific view does not need to deny this sacred meaning. At the same time, broad claims that Zamzam automatically cures every disease are different from carefully tested medical evidence. It is possible to honor Zamzam as sacred while also distinguishing among religious belief, observed water composition, and proven health effects. This distinction is important because reverence for sacred water should not require turning every popular claim into a scientific conclusion.

Modern access to Zamzam also involves public health, regulation, and authenticity. In the Grand Mosque and official distribution systems, Zamzam is provided through controlled channels so that pilgrims can drink it safely and conveniently. Bottled Zamzam for travelers is distributed through official procedures, while commercial export as an ordinary product is restricted. These rules help protect the identity of Zamzam and reduce the risk of fake, contaminated, or mishandled water being sold under its name. In this sense, Zamzam is not only a memory of the past. It is also a sacred resource that must be preserved, monitored, and shared responsibly in the present.

The story of Zamzam therefore cannot be reduced to a single category. If it is treated only as a chemical sample, its religious significance is missed. If it is discussed only through popular claims, the importance of water quality and responsible management may be ignored. A balanced understanding recognizes all three dimensions: Zamzam as sacred water in Islamic tradition, Zamzam as mineral-rich groundwater that can be scientifically tested, and Zamzam as a public resource requiring careful regulation. Its lasting importance lies partly in this combination of faith, science, and service.

Soal dan Pembahasan

title: Limestone Caves and the Memory of Water
topic: Geology, climate clues, underground landscapes, and slow natural processes
passage:
Subtopik singkat: Geology, climate clues, underground landscapes, and slow natural processes

Naskah

Limestone caves are often imagined as empty underground chambers filled with darkness, echoes, and unusual rock formations. Although this image is not entirely wrong, it misses one of the most important qualities of caves: they are records of movement. Water passes through soil, enters cracks in stone, dissolves minerals, leaves deposits behind, and slowly changes the shape of the underground world. A cave may appear still to a visitor, but its walls, ceilings, floors, and mineral formations often reflect long histories of water, climate, and landscape change.

Most limestone caves begin with a simple chemical process. Rainwater absorbs carbon dioxide from the air and from decaying organic matter in soil, becoming slightly acidic. As this water moves through cracks in limestone, it dissolves small amounts of the rock. Over thousands of years, narrow fractures can widen into channels, passages, and chambers. The process is slow, but it is also persistent. A small crack that seems insignificant at first can become part of a large cave system if water continues to follow the same route.

The features inside caves, such as stalactites, stalagmites, and flowstone, form when mineral-rich water enters open air underground. As the water releases carbon dioxide, it can no longer hold the same amount of dissolved calcium carbonate, so tiny mineral layers are left behind. Layer after layer may accumulate into visible forms. These deposits are not just decorations. Their shapes and internal layers can reflect changes in drip rate, mineral content, and the conditions above the cave. However, they should not be read as simple calendars. A thick layer does not always mean one kind of climate, and a thin layer does not always mean the opposite.

One reason caves can preserve environmental clues is that they are partly protected from rapid surface changes. Sunlight, wind, fire, and daily temperature shifts have less influence underground than they do on open landscapes. In this relatively stable setting, mineral deposits may remain in place for long periods. Yet this stability can be misleading. A cave is not sealed away from the world above it. The water that enters a cave has already passed through soil, roots, and rock, carrying chemical traces of the surface. In this way, caves are both protected from the surface and connected to it.

This slow exchange between the surface and the underground environment makes caves valuable for understanding past conditions. Changes in rainfall, vegetation, soil activity, and even land use can affect how water moves into a cave and what minerals it carries. A dry period may reduce dripping in some passages, while heavier rainfall may increase flow in others. If forests above a cave are removed, the chemistry of the soil water may also change. The cave does not explain these changes by itself, but it can preserve traces that help people ask better questions about them.

To understand a limestone cave, then, one must see it not as a frozen museum but as a landscape shaped by time. Its formations are produced by patient processes that connect air, soil, water, stone, and climate. The cave’s quiet appearance hides a long history of movement. Even when no stream is visible and no sound is heard except a falling drop of water, the cave is still part of a larger system. It reminds us that some of the most important changes in the natural world occur slowly, in places where they are easy to overlook.

Soal dan Pembahasan

questions.keyEvidence: Passage menjelaskan bahwa limestone caves terbentuk oleh pergerakan air, menyimpan mineral deposits, tetap terhubung dengan permukaan, dan dapat membantu memahami perubahan lingkungan masa lalu.
questions.paraphrasedEvidence: Passage menjelaskan bahwa limestone caves terbentuk oleh pergerakan air, menyimpan mineral deposits, tetap terhubung dengan permukaan, dan dapat membantu memahami perubahan lingkungan masa lalu.
questions.questionText: What is the passage mainly about?

choices.A: The reasons limestone caves are more useful for tourism than for scientific interpretation
choices.B: The way underground chambers become isolated from all surface conditions
choices.C: The importance of stalactites and stalagmites as the only reliable climate records
choices.D: The role of limestone caves as slow-forming landscapes that preserve clues about water and environmental change

explanation.summary: Gagasan utama teks bukan sekadar “gua terbentuk dari batu kapur,” tetapi bagaimana gua menjadi lanskap bawah tanah yang menyimpan jejak air, iklim, dan perubahan lingkungan secara perlahan.
explanation.whyCorrect: Jawaban ini paling tepat karena mencakup seluruh isi passage: pembentukan gua, peran air, mineral deposits, hubungan permukaan-bawah tanah, dan nilai gua sebagai penyimpan petunjuk lingkungan.

optionAnalysis.A: Opsi ini terdengar mungkin karena gua sering dikunjungi orang, tetapi passage tidak membahas pariwisata sebagai fokus utama. Tourism hanya ada dalam bayangan umum pembaca, bukan argumen teks.
optionAnalysis.B: Pilihan ini mengambil ide “protected underground,” tetapi mengubahnya menjadi terlalu mutlak. Passage justru menekankan bahwa gua tetap terhubung dengan permukaan melalui air.
optionAnalysis.C: Stalactites dan stalagmites memang penting, tetapi bukan satu-satunya fokus. Selain itu, passage memperingatkan bahwa lapisan mineral tidak boleh dibaca sebagai simple calendars.
optionAnalysis.D: Jawaban ini paling tepat karena mencakup seluruh isi passage: pembentukan gua, peran air, mineral deposits, hubungan permukaan-bawah tanah, dan nilai gua sebagai penyimpan petunjuk lingkungan.

explanation.toeflTrap: Opsi main idea yang salah sering mengambil detail penting lalu membuatnya tampak sebagai pusat seluruh teks. Di sini, mineral deposits penting, tetapi passage lebih luas daripada itu.
explanation.quickNote: Main idea passage ini: limestone caves are slow natural records of water and environmental change.

questions.keyEvidence: Paragraph 2 states that rainwater absorbs carbon dioxide, becomes slightly acidic, and dissolves small amounts of limestone as it moves through cracks.
questions.paraphrasedEvidence: Paragraph 2 states that rainwater absorbs carbon dioxide, becomes slightly acidic, and dissolves small amounts of limestone as it moves through cracks.
questions.questionText: According to paragraph 2, how do many limestone caves begin to form?

choices.A: Fast underground rivers carve large empty rooms in a short period of time.
choices.B: Heat from volcanic activity melts limestone into connected tunnels.
choices.C: Slightly acidic water dissolves limestone as it moves through cracks.
choices.D: Wind carries mineral dust into openings and builds underground chambers.

explanation.summary: Gua kapur terbentuk melalui proses kimia yang lambat dan terus-menerus, bukan karena kekuatan fisik yang tiba-tiba.
explanation.whyCorrect: Jawaban ini sesuai langsung dengan paragraf 2: air yang sedikit asam melarutkan limestone melalui retakan.

optionAnalysis.A: Pilihan ini menggoda karena passage memang membahas water movement, tetapi teks tidak mengatakan gua terbentuk cepat oleh sungai bawah tanah besar. Proses yang ditekankan adalah pelarutan lambat.
optionAnalysis.B: Volcanic heat sama sekali tidak menjadi mekanisme dalam passage. Ini terdengar ilmiah, tetapi tidak cocok untuk limestone cave formation yang dijelaskan teks.
optionAnalysis.C: Jawaban ini sesuai langsung dengan paragraf 2: air yang sedikit asam melarutkan limestone melalui retakan.
optionAnalysis.D: Wind dan mineral dust tidak dijelaskan sebagai penyebab terbentuknya chamber. Passage menekankan air, carbon dioxide, dan dissolving process.

explanation.toeflTrap: Detail question sering memakai elemen yang benar, seperti water atau minerals, tetapi mengubah prosesnya. Pastikan hubungan sebab-akibat tetap sama seperti di passage.
explanation.quickNote: Limestone caves form slowly when acidic water dissolves rock.
