NFFQ7 — Negative Fact / EXCEPT

Soal: According to the passage, neighborhood football fields may be associated with all of the following EXCEPT:

A. flexible rules and improvised goalpostsB. permanent control by the loudest group as the ideal outcomeC. informal learning about fairness and cooperationD. unequal access shaped by safety, gender expectations, or local customs

Jawaban benar: B. permanent control by the loudest group as the ideal outcomeTipe soal: Negative Fact / EXCEPTLokasi bukti: Seluruh passage, terutama paragraf 2–5.Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti: Passage menyatakan challenge is not to eliminate every disagreement, but to manage shared use so the field does not become controlled permanently by the loudest or strongest group.Inti pemahaman: Yang tidak sesuai adalah gagasan bahwa kontrol permanen oleh kelompok paling keras adalah hasil ideal. Teks justru memperingatkan agar itu tidak terjadi.

Analisis opsi A–D:A. Paragraf 2 mendukung ini melalui flexible rules dan goalposts marked by sandals, bags, stones, or a wall.B. Inilah jawaban EXCEPT karena passage menyatakan shared use harus dikelola agar field tidak dikuasai kelompok paling kuat atau paling keras.C. Paragraf 2–3 mendukung fairness, cooperation, dan informal learning.D. Paragraf 4 mendukung ini melalui location, safety, time, gender expectations, dan local customs.

Jebakan TOEFL: EXCEPT sering membalik nilai normatif passage. Di sini, sesuatu yang diperingatkan penulis dijadikan seolah-olah ideal.Catatan cepat: Shared space should not be permanently captured by one group.

questions.keyEvidence: Paragraf 4 menyatakan field is not neutral simply because it is open land; access depends on location, safety, time, gender expectations, and local customs.
questions.paraphrasedEvidence: Paragraf 4 menyatakan field is not neutral simply because it is open land; access depends on location, safety, time, gender expectations, and local customs.
questions.questionText: What can be inferred from paragraph 4 about access to neighborhood football fields?

choices.A: Open land automatically makes a field equally welcoming to everyone.
choices.B: Girls participate less only because they are not interested in football.
choices.C: Safety and lighting matter less than whether the field has official lines.
choices.D: Social rules and physical conditions can influence who feels able to use the field.

explanation.summary: Akses bukan hanya soal ada ruang kosong. Kondisi fisik dan aturan sosial menentukan siapa yang merasa aman dan diterima.
explanation.whyCorrect: Jawaban ini tepat karena menangkap kombinasi physical conditions dan social expectations.

optionAnalysis.A: Passage secara eksplisit menolak gagasan bahwa open land otomatis netral.
optionAnalysis.B: Teks mengatakan girls may have fewer opportunities not because they lack interest, but because social rules make participation difficult.
optionAnalysis.C: Safety dan lighting penting dalam paragraf, sementara official lines tidak menjadi ukuran utama akses.
optionAnalysis.D: Jawaban ini tepat karena menangkap kombinasi physical conditions dan social expectations.

explanation.toeflTrap: Inference yang salah sering mengubah hambatan sosial menjadi masalah minat pribadi. Passage jelas menolak itu.
explanation.quickNote: Access is physical and social.
explanation.sourceNotes:
NFFQ8 — Inference

Soal: What can be inferred from paragraph 4 about access to neighborhood football fields?

A. Open land automatically makes a field equally welcoming to everyone.B. Girls participate less only because they are not interested in football.C. Safety and lighting matter less than whether the field has official lines.D. Social rules and physical conditions can influence who feels able to use the field.

Jawaban benar: D. Social rules and physical conditions can influence who feels able to use the field.Tipe soal: InferenceLokasi bukti: Paragraf 4.Bukti kunci / Parafrase bukti: Paragraf 4 menyatakan field is not neutral simply because it is open land; access depends on location, safety, time, gender expectations, and local customs.Inti pemahaman: Akses bukan hanya soal ada ruang kosong. Kondisi fisik dan aturan sosial menentukan siapa yang merasa aman dan diterima.

Analisis opsi A–D:A. Passage secara eksplisit menolak gagasan bahwa open land otomatis netral.B. Teks mengatakan girls may have fewer opportunities not because they lack interest, but because social rules make participation difficult.C. Safety dan lighting penting dalam paragraf, sementara official lines tidak menjadi ukuran utama akses.D. Jawaban ini tepat karena menangkap kombinasi physical conditions dan social expectations.

Jebakan TOEFL: Inference yang salah sering mengubah hambatan sosial menjadi masalah minat pribadi. Passage jelas menolak itu.Catatan cepat: Access is physical and social.

questions.keyEvidence: Final paragraph menyatakan field teaches lessons: wait for a turn, accept a disputed goal, include a weaker player, lose without leaving, and return the next day.
questions.paraphrasedEvidence: Final paragraph menyatakan field teaches lessons: wait for a turn, accept a disputed goal, include a weaker player, lose without leaving, and return the next day.
questions.questionText: What is the author’s purpose in the final paragraph?

choices.A: To explain why neighborhood football should become a professional sport system
choices.B: To argue that disagreement should be removed from all public spaces
choices.C: To show that neighborhood fields teach social lessons beyond the game itself
choices.D: To suggest that sport is valuable only when everyone has equal skill

explanation.summary: Penulis menutup dengan menegaskan bahwa nilai lapangan lebih besar daripada permainan; ia melatih cara hidup bersama.
explanation.whyCorrect: Jawaban ini tepat karena final paragraph menyimpulkan social lessons dari field.

optionAnalysis.A: Passage tidak mengarahkan neighborhood football menjadi sistem profesional. Nilainya justru pada ruang informal dan partisipatif.
optionAnalysis.B: Passage tidak menolak semua disagreement. Paragraf 5 bahkan mengatakan tantangannya bukan menghapus semua perselisihan, tetapi mengelola shared use.
optionAnalysis.C: Jawaban ini tepat karena final paragraph menyimpulkan social lessons dari field.
optionAnalysis.D: Passage tidak mensyaratkan equal skill; justru membahas inclusion of weaker players dan partisipasi lintas kemampuan.

explanation.toeflTrap: Author’s purpose pada penutup sering mengangkat makna lebih luas dari topik literal. Di sini, football field menjadi tempat belajar komunitas.
explanation.quickNote: Final paragraph = football field as social education.

To show that neighborhood fields teach social lessons beyond the game itselfD. To suggest that sport is valuable only when everyone has equal skill

Jawaban benar: C. Paragraf 5 bahkan mengatakan tantangannya bukan menghapus semua perselisihan, tetapi mengelola shared use.C. Jawaban ini tepat karena final paragraph menyimpulkan social lessons dari field.D.
